cards.title: Agent Licensing
cards.content:
ΓÇó Form I-A is used for applying for an agency.
ΓÇó An exam must be passed. Certificate is valid for 12 months for appointment.
ΓÇó Composite Agent: Sells Life + General + Health (Max 1 of each type).

cards.title: Code of Conduct
cards.content:
ΓÇó Mandates what an agent MUST do (e.g., show ID card) and MUST NOT do (e.g., force a customer).
ΓÇó Multi-level Marketing in insurance is strictly prohibited.

items.text: Violation of Code of Conduct attracts a penalty of up to Γé╣10,000 for the agent.
The insurance company can face a penalty of up to Γé╣1 Crore for violations.
If an agent resigns, they must wait 90 days before joining another insurer.

sections.title: ≡ƒÆí Exam Master Tips
items: Section 42(3) of Insurance Act: Disqualifies minors, people of unsound mind, or those convicted of fraud from becoming agents.
Rebate: Offering a portion of the commission to the customer to buy the policy is illegal (Section 41).
An agent must surrender their license (Cessation Certificate) if they resign.
The insurer has 15 days to issue the appointment letter after a successful application.
Blacklisted Agents are those whose licenses were cancelled due to fraud or misconduct.
